name: ProteinMPNN-ddG Binder
description: Given a protein structure, predict binding affinity change for all point mutations rapidly, prioritizing stability improving mutations (runs ProteinMPNN-ddG for unbound and bound states). Implements tied decoding scheme to limit computation compared to ProteinMPNN.
capabilities: Given a protein structure, predict binding affinity change for all point mutations rapidly, prioritizing stability improving mutations (runs ProteinMPNN-ddG for unbound and bound states)
Implements tied decoding scheme to limit computation compared to ProteinMPNN

pdbFile.description: Protein complex structure in PDB format for predicting binding affinity changes

binderChain.description: Chain ID of the binder protein to evaluate mutations on

targetChain.description: Chain ID of the target protein
